---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<!-- One sentence: what would you like the project to do? -->

## Why

<!-- The user-facing problem this solves. What are you trying to monitor /
     configure / debug that you can't today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- If you have an idea of how it should work, describe it. -->
<!-- Mock-ups, sketches, or example config snippets help. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried; other tools that do this; reasons to prefer
     them or not. -->

## Scope

<!-- Optional: is this a quick admin UI change, a new probe type, a dashboard
     addition, an infrastructure piece? -->
